title: Kainchi
description: A silver-winning short film shaped around fracture, hesitation, and the weight of a single irreversible decision.

title: Anushruti Academy
description: A documentary-led portrait observing discipline, artistic growth, and the atmosphere that lives around performance.

title: Aaoge Tum Kabhi
description: An intimate music video driven by low-light emotion, restrained movement, and a quietly romantic visual rhythm.

title: Kasak
description: An online short film centered on distance, longing, and the stillness that lingers after an emotional rupture.

title: Saanjh
description: A gold-winning short framed with dusky textures, measured pacing, and a strong sense of emotional suspense.

title: Ishq Hai
description: A youthful performance piece balancing softness, rhythm, and a polished commercial visual language.

title: Pehchaan
description: A character-led short film built around identity, vulnerability, and the slow reveal of inner conflict.

title: DSA Diss Track
description: A stylized performance video with sharp tempo, graphic blocking, and an intentionally high-energy frame language.
